response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in the required technologies, including TypeScript, Node.js, and React. They have worked on complex projects and demonstrated proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proficient in multiple programming languages including TypeScript, Java, and Dlang
Experience with cloud platforms, containerization, and testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of experience with PostgreSQL or MySQL
No direct mention of AI agent development experience, though they have worked on AI-agent infrastructure
